description: Design-level access control patterns and anti-patterns

entries.title: Unbounded Admin Privilege
entries.summary: Admin roles with broad unscoped permissions without timelocks or multi-sig

indicators: Single admin role with pause + upgrade + parameter changes
No multi-sig requirement for governance actions
design_context.description: The design grants admin roles broad, unscoped permissions without timelocks, multi-sig, or capability separation. A compromised admin key means total protocol compromise.

entries.title: Missing Role Separation
entries.summary: Critical operations require single role when they should require independent approval

indicators: Same role can set parameters and upgrade contracts
No distinction between operator and governor roles
Operational and governance privileges combined in single role
design_context.description: Critical operations require a single role when they should require independent approval from multiple roles. No separation between operational and governance privileges.
